parsed.mechanism: Expert-choice routing dynamically selects which agent interactions to attend to per memory-synthesis head, routing diverse test-time experiences into sparse high-signal subsets that produce higher-quality synthesized memory, which in turn regulates more effective scaling.
parsed.transfer: MoSA's expert-choice routing for dynamically selecting tokens transfers to selecting which scaled agent experiences feed memory synthesis.
parsed.open_problem: Can expert-choice routing over agent experiences select the sparse subset that maximizes synthesized memory quality under a fixed test-time interaction budget?
parsed.niche_name: Expert-Choice Routing of Agent Experiences for Memory Synthesis
parsed.primary_quote: expert choice routing that dynamically selects tokens for each attention head
